title: Agent Instruction Format v0.1 Packet
description: Minimal, reviewable instruction packet for agent-facing instruction material. Candidate namespace only; not a standard.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version this packet conforms to.

packetStatus.description: Lifecycle status of the packet. v0.1 only permits 'candidate'.

scope.description: Short statement of what the packet covers.

authority.description: Who/what issued the packet and its non-canon posture.

nonCanon.description: If true, the packet does not claim to canonize any concept.

instructionContract.description: The executable contract for the instruction.

hierarchyLevel.description: Rank in an instruction hierarchy (lower = stronger).

content.description: The instruction content (string or structured object).

overrideRules.description: How this packet interacts with conflicting instructions.

inheritancePolicy.description: Whether/how child contexts inherit this instruction.

receiptRequirements.description: What a reviewer or executor must confirm before acting on the packet.

confirmScope.description: Reviewer must confirm the packet scope is understood.

confirmNoSecrets.description: Reviewer must confirm the packet contains no secrets or private operational content.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes for the reviewer.
